_note: Master index of ISO standard reference data available in this repository. Files marked canonical=true contain the primary data for that standard; cross_reference points to the canonical location when the data lives outside the iso/ folder.

standards.title: Writing paper and certain classes of printed matter — Trimmed sizes (A/B series) + Envelope sizes (C series)
standards.description: A0–A10, B0–B10, C0–C6/DL paper sizes in mm and inches, plus US/ANSI sizes (Letter, Legal, Ledger) for reference.

standards.title: ISO general-purpose metric screw threads — Basic dimensions and selected sizes
standards.description: Metric thread designations M1–M64 with coarse/fine pitch, stress area, typical applications, wrench sizes, and head/nut/washer type references.

standards.title: Codes for the representation of names of languages
standards.description: Two-letter (639-1) and three-letter (639-2) language codes covering ~140 languages with script, direction, and native-name metadata.

standards.title: Codes for the representation of names of countries — Part 1: Country codes
standards.description: Alpha-2, alpha-3, and numeric codes for countries with capital city, continent, dial code, and currency.

standards.title: Codes for the representation of currencies
standards.description: Three-letter currency codes and numeric codes with symbol and decimal places.

standards.title: Date and time — Representations for information interchange
standards.description: Complete reference for ISO 8601 date, time, datetime, duration, and interval format patterns with regex validators and ordering rules.

standards.title: Securities and related financial instruments — Codes for exchanges and market identification (MIC)
standards.description: Market Identification Codes for 22 major stock exchanges with trading hours, currency, and timezone.

standards.title: Codes for the representation of names of scripts
standards.description: Four-letter script codes (e.g. Latn, Arab, Cyrl) with numeric codes, writing direction, representative languages, and Unicode ranges.

standards.title: Information security, cybersecurity and privacy protection — ISMS requirements
standards.description: All 93 Annex A controls organized into 4 themes (Organizational, People, Physical, Technological) with control type (preventive/detective/corrective) and full description.

standards.title: Quality management systems — Requirements
standards.description: All 7 requirement clauses (4–10) broken into subclauses with actionable checklists. Includes the list of 19 mandatory documented information items.

planned.title: Codes for formerly used country names
